simd_json/encode_initialize.note: simd-json encode is slightly slower than serde_json for small messages

simd_json/encode_tools_list.note: simd-json encode is comparable to serde_json

simd_json/decode_tools_list.note: simd-json decode is comparable for larger messages with clone overhead

aafp_cbor/decode_rpc_request.note: CBOR is already very fast for small AAFP messages

key_findings.json_encode: serde_json encode is already fast (158ns for 192B initialize)
key_findings.json_decode: simd-json decode is 1.45x faster than serde_json for small messages (399ns vs 580ns)
key_findings.cbor_encode: aafp_cbor encode is 138ns for 16B RPC request — already well under 500ns target
key_findings.cbor_decode: aafp_cbor decode is 94ns for 16B RPC request — already well under 500ns target
key_findings.conclusion: CBOR path (aafp_cbor) is already optimized. JSON decode benefits from simd-json (1.45x). JSON encode is comparable.
